title: t_constraint_nosolver_bad fails intermittently
body:
Reading the code there is a race between opening a non-existent solver and it terminating, and actually trying to send it the sanity check problem here:

https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/5b7188fcafcdfdf0743b126f1b8a4686704d9cc5/include/verilated_random.cpp#L234-L236

This yields to intermittent failure of the test, especially under heavy host load.

Here is the diff between failing and expected:

```diff
diff -U20  obj_vlt/t_constraint_nosolver_bad/vlt_sim.log t/t_constraint_nosolver_bad.out                                                                                                                      1 ↵
--- obj_vlt/t_constraint_nosolver_bad/vlt_sim.log       2025-08-07 12:29:20.431131136 +0100
+++ t/t_constraint_nosolver_bad.out     2025-03-19 15:11:55.045065265 +0000
@@ -1,9 +1,7 @@
 Process::open: execvp(someimaginarysolver): No such file or directory
-write: Broken pipe
 %Warning: Subprocess command `someimaginarysolver' failed: exit status 127
-read: Bad file descriptor
 %Warning: Unable to communicate with SAT solver, please check its installation or specify a different one in VERILATOR_SOLVER environment variable.
  ... Tried: $ someimaginarysolver

 %Error: t/t_constraint.v:25: Verilog $stop
 Aborting...

```
code_blocks:

--- obj_vlt/t_constraint_nosolver_bad/vlt_sim.log       2025-08-07 12:29:20.431131136 +0100
+++ t/t_constraint_nosolver_bad.out     2025-03-19 15:11:55.045065265 +0000
@@ -1,9 +1,7 @@
 Process::open: execvp(someimaginarysolver): No such file or directory
-write: Broken pipe
 %Warning: Subprocess command `someimaginarysolver' failed: exit status 127
-read: Bad file descriptor
 %Warning: Unable to communicate with SAT solver, please check its installation or specify a different one in VERILATOR_SOLVER environment variable.
  ... Tried: $ someimaginarysolver

 %Error: t/t_constraint.v:25: Verilog $stop
 Aborting...
